title: 16 Pcs Gel Toe Protectors, Silicone Toe Cover Protector for Men & Women Running, Walking, Prevent Blister, Corn, Calluses, Sore Toes, Hammer Toes Prevent Friction Injury
features: 【Silicone Gel Material】Our toe caps are made of silicone gel. These toe sleeves are professionally designed, durable, soft and skin-friendly, odorless, elastic, can be extensible, easily stretch.

【Reusable to Use】This gel toe cover is washable and reusable with high elasticity and flexibility. You can also use scissors to cut the gel toe protector cover to the right size according to the size of your toes to make it fit better on your toes.

【Provide Instant Protector】These silicone toe sleeves help free your toes from corn, blisters, calluses, overlap, hammer toes or other painful spots on toes, protect missing or ingrown toenail, while protecting the toes from skin infections. Provide you with a supportive cushion that helps eliminate pressure and pain.

【Simple to Use】Toe protector can use both men and women, you could wears them with shoes (high-heels, hiking shoes, sports Shoes and walking shoes) even while working and it is ok to wear while sleeping.

【What You Will Get】This toe protector set has a total of 16 pcs toe covers, including 10 pcs large toe covers and 6 pcs small toe covers. Enough for your toe comfortable and safe when you are walking ,running ,dancing and the other daily life.
description: Product Description Medo 16 Pcs Gel Toe Caps, Silicone Toe Cover Protector for Wen & Women Running, Walking, Prevent Blister, Corn, Calluses, Sore Toes Are you suffering from some annoying foot problems like a missing nail, ingrown nail corn, blisters, calluses or hammer toe that make it difficult to walk when wearing shoes? Medo Gel Toe Caps help you solve them, They are specially designed to relieve your pain. It is such a barrier between your feet and shoes that your footwear will not rub against your toe while protecting toe from secondary damage. Premium Material These gel caps are made of silicone, which is extra soft and durable, reusable for long time use. Ergonomic Design Slim design Conforms to your toe, the toe caps can be worn in your daily shoes and stay in place, to prevent rubbing and skin irritation. Meet Different Needs 2 sizes silicone toe sleeves are available, so you can use on various toe. The toe protector can be cut to fit for your toe length.
